NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES AND REQ. FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TO IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELLAND, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELLAND, MICHAEL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELLAND, MICHAEL
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-13-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MELLAND'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES AND REQ. FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TO IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MELLAND'S MOVING PAPERS. THERE IS NO RECORD THAT DEFENDANT LYLE BARTLETT OPPOSES THIS MOTION. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED: (1) DEFENDANT LYLE BARTLETT, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BARTLETT CABINETS, SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSES TO MELLAND'S WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR (SET NO. ONE), WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. (2) DEFENDANT LYLE BARTLETT, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BARTLETT CABINETS, SHALL PROVIDE WRITTEN RESPONSES TO MELLAND'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET NO. ONE), WITHOUT OBJECTION, AND ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. (3) MELLAND'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS OF $1,140 IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MELLAND'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TO IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE, WITHOUT OBJECTION, CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHIN TEN DAYS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $440 PAYABLE WITHIN TEN DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Written Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant LYLE BARLETT, Tel No. 415-385-6238 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court determines that Mr. Barlett did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MELLAND'S Motion To Compel Responses To Written Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions is granted. Defendant shall serve, without objection, code compliant responses within ten days. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $440 payable within ten days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Written Interrogatories And Req. For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RANDALL E. KAY OF KAY & TAWASHA LLP, TEL. NO. 345-1170 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MELLAND'S MOTION To Compel Responses To Written Interrogatories And Req. For Production Of Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions is Granted, for reasons set forth in plaintiff Michael Melland's moving papers. There is no record that defendant Lyle Bartlett opposes this motion. It is hereby ordered: (1) Defendant Lyle Bartlett, individually and dba Bartlett Cabinets, shall provide responses to Melland's Written Interrogatories to Judgment Debtor (Set No. One), without objection, within fifteen (15) calendar days of the signed Order on this motion. (2) Defendant Lyle Bartlett, individually and dba Bartlett Cabinets, shall provide written responses to Melland's Request for Production of Documents (Set No. One), without objection, and all responsive documents, within fifteen (15) calendar days of the signed Order on this motion. (3) Melland's request for sanctions of $1,140 is granted. Sanctions shall be paid within fifteen (15) calendar days of the signed Order on this motion.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/jpt
